text: I find myself in a space curated for reflection—one part meeting room, another part gallery of ideas. The glass walls and bright screens evoke an air of anticipation and intellect, as if knowledge is waiting just beyond the transparent barrier. The R+D display invites inquiry, underscoring the dynamic relationship between humans and their environments. I feel curious, contemplative, and slightly awed by this fusion of creativity, research, and the promise of collaboration.
